summary: Matched and linked the M Ball item unit by converting src/melee/it/items/itmball.c from NonMatching to Matching, adding the it_803F6488 ItemStateTable data definition, implementing the previously placeholder functions itMball_EnteredAir and itMball_80297E8C, and renaming the M Ball callback/symbol set from generic it_3F14_Logic34 or UnkMotion names to item-local itMball_* names. The decomp.dev report credited 3 new matches: itMball_80297E8C (+264 bytes), itMball_EnteredAir (+140 bytes), and .data (+112 bytes), plus an .sdata2 improvement.
what_changed: Changed configure.py so melee/it/items/itmball.c is built as Object(Matching, ...) instead of Object(NonMatching, ...).
Added the it_803F6488 ItemStateTable definition in itmball.c with seven states wired to itMball_Motion0 through itMball_Motion6 Anim/Phys/Coll callbacks.

Implemented itMball_EnteredAir, replacing the prior placeholder comment for it_3F14_Logic34_EnteredAir. The function switches to item state 4, derives facing_dir from x40_vel.x + x7C.x + x88.x, and calls mpCollSetFacingDir.

Implemented itMball_80297E8C, replacing the prior placeholder comment for it_80297E8C. The function clears item state/velocity fields, calls it_80274740, initializes the life timer from itMBallAttributes on first entry, spawns effect 1097 with efAsync_Spawn, plays Item_8026AE84, enters state 6, and assigns item->on_accessory = itMball_OnAccessory.

Renamed public M Ball callbacks in symbols.txt and itmball.h from generic names such as it_3F14_Logic34_Spawned, it_3F14_Logic34_Destroyed, and itMball_UnkMotion*_Anim/Phys/Coll to item-scoped names such as itMball_Spawned, itMball_Destroyed, and itMball_Motion*_Anim/Phys/Coll.
Updated the M Ball entry in the ItemLogicTable in src/melee/it/it_2725.c to call the renamed itMball_* lifecycle callbacks, and updated the mirrored commented table in src/melee/it/it_3F14.c.
Adjusted GALE01 sdata2 symbols at 0x804DCBC0, 0x804DCBC4, and 0x804DCBC8 from global it_804DCBC* names to local @152, @186, and @187 labels.

Cleaned up itmball.c includes by removing placeholder.h and unused/older include paths and adding direct dependencies including it/item.h, it/items/forward.h, mp/mpcoll.h, baselib/gobj.h, and baselib/jobj.h.
smart_moves: The PR did not just implement missing functions; it linked the whole unit by adding the state table data and flipping the build configuration to Matching, making the progress visible to the build system.

Renaming the entire M Ball callback family consistently across symbols.txt, the header, source, and logic tables reduced dependence on generic it_3F14_Logic34 names and made the item module easier to search and maintain.
For itMball_EnteredAir, the code preserves game behavior by setting collision facing direction from the computed facing_dir rather than only changing the item state.
For itMball_80297E8C, the implementation carefully resets flags, xD5C, velocity components, and ground/physics state before entering the timed state and installing the accessory callback.
The sdata2 relabeling to local @ labels reflects the compiler-generated constant model better than keeping artificial global float names, improving data matching evidence.
decomp_lessons: When an item unit is ready to link, update configure.py, symbols.txt, the item header, and all logic-table references together; stale generic names can keep linked code or data from reflecting the matched module cleanly.
Item state table data can be a meaningful matching target on its own; this PR gained a .data match by materializing it_803F6488 in the item source with the correct state IDs and callback order.
Placeholder functions should be replaced with behavior that includes all side effects: state changes, collision-facing updates, effect spawning, timers, flags, velocities, and accessory callbacks.
For item modules, item-specific callback names like itMball_Spawned and itMball_MotionN_Coll are preferable to table-origin names like it_3F14_Logic34_* once ownership is understood.
Local compiler constants in .sdata2 may need local @ labels rather than invented global names to improve data matching.
naming_conventions: Use the item prefix itMball_ for M Ball functions.

Lifecycle callbacks were named directly by event: itMball_Spawned, itMball_Destroyed, itMball_PickedUp, itMball_Dropped, itMball_Thrown, itMball_DmgDealt, itMball_EnteredAir, itMball_Clanked, itMball_Reflected, itMball_HitShield, itMball_ShieldBounced, and itMball_EvtUnk.
Motion callbacks use itMball_MotionN_Anim, itMball_MotionN_Phys, and itMball_MotionN_Coll rather than itMball_UnkMotionN_*.
Unknown helper functions still retain address-based suffixes under the item prefix, e.g. itMball_80297944, itMball_802979D4, itMball_80297CC4, and itMball_80297E8C.
The accessory callback is named by role as itMball_OnAccessory instead of keeping the address-only name it_80297DD8.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Used a ternary expression for facing_dir in itMball_EnteredAir: the sum of x40_vel.x, x7C.x, and x88.x selects 1.0f or -1.0f, then maps to the integer direction passed to mpCollSetFacingDir.
Kept callback casts where needed for item collision helpers, such as casting itMball_80297CC4 to void (*)(HSD_GObj*) for it_8026E414 and it_8026E15C.
In itMball_80297E8C, zeroed x40_vel.x, x40_vel.y, and x40_vel.z in a chained assignment, matching the compact reset pattern used by the function.
Installed item->on_accessory = itMball_OnAccessory in both itMball_80297CC4 and itMball_80297E8C, preserving the repeated callback setup in both transition paths.
Relabeled three sdata2 constants as local @152, @186, and @187 symbols, which the decomp.dev report associated with improving the itmball .sdata2 match from 66.67% to 85.71%.
review_feedback: No human review comments were present in the slice.
The decomp.dev bot reported GALE01 progress: matched code +404 bytes, linked code +2188 bytes, matched data +112 bytes, linked data +128 bytes.
The bot specifically reported new 100% matches for itMball_80297E8C, itMball_EnteredAir, and itmball .data.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that rename address-only helpers itMball_80297944, itMball_802979D4, itMball_80297CC4, or itMball_80297E8C to semantic names.
Search for other item PRs that materialize ItemStateTable arrays and flip modules from NonMatching to Matching.
Compare itMball_EnteredAir with EnteredAir implementations for other throwable items that set facing_dir and call mpCollSetFacingDir.
Search for PRs that relabel sdata2 globals to local @ labels to improve data matching.
